basic_details.job_title: NIPER Hajipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER) Hajipur
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research, Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 under Advt. No. NIPERHjp/PT/2026/01. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Junior Research Fellow positions on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 30 years of age and holding M.S./M.Pharm in Pharmacology/Pharmacology & Toxicology, M.Sc. in Medical Pharmacology/Biotechnology, or relevant AYUSH postgraduate qualifications with NET/GATE/GPAT or equivalent national-level examination qualification are eligible to apply through email. The application proces

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PWD candidates as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.S./M.Pharm in Pharmacology/Pharmacology and Toxicology, M.Sc. in Medical Pharmacology/M.Sc. Biotechnology, PG in AYUSH courses or similar disciplines with NET/GATE/GPAT/relevant national level competitive exam
qualification.details: M.S./M.Pharm in Pharmacology/Pharmacology and Toxicology, M.Sc. in Medical Pharmacology/M.Sc. Biotechnology, PG in AYUSH courses or similar disciplines with qualification of NET/GATE/GPAT/relevant national level competitive exam and research experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIPER Hajipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIPER Hajipur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Hajipur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIPER Hajipur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.S./M.Pharm in Pharmacology/Pharmacology and Toxicology, M.Sc. in Medical Pharmacology/M.Sc. Biotechnology, or a PG in AYUSH courses or similar disciplines with NET/GATE/GPAT/relevant national level competitive exam.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 30 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the NIPER Hajipur Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to the address specified in the official notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER) Hajipur.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NIPERHjp/PT/2026/01.
